description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image and a before_script that updates apt, installs apt-transport-https, adds the sbt repository, imports its GPG key, updates again, installs sbt, and runs sbt sbt-version to verify the sbt installation. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that executes the shell command 'sbt clean test'. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
